name: Slack Bot Plugin
description: A Plugin for sending instructions to multi-agents from Slack and receiving results. Enables ticket creation, progress checking, and approval operations via Slash Commands and mentions. Integrates with AI Secretary and AI Avatar Plugins for briefing delivery and user-proxy responses on Slack.
use_cases: Create tickets from Slack (natural language messages or Slash Commands)
Check progress and query status via Slack
Approval workflow via Slack (Block Kit buttons)
Converse with AI agents in threads
Morning briefing delivery from AI Secretary
User-proxy responses via AI Avatar (within approved scope)

integration.ai_secretary: Deliver AI Secretary Plugin briefings and reminders to Slack channels
integration.ai_avatar: Post AI Avatar Plugin proxy responses in Slack threads (within approved scope)
integration.notifications: Can set Slack as the default notification destination via Notifications Extension

commands./zeo ask <question>: Ask the AI organization (Design Interview-style dialogue)

note: Requires Slack App Token configuration. Not included in the core — installed as a Plugin add-on.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
